channel.title: BUbreakingSectionTwo
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from BUbreakingSectionTwo, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: A millennial manager took her job hunt to Tinder and landed 3 interviews—she says getting a job on the dating app was easier than finding love
item.description: On top of tapping the usual suspects like LinkedIn and Indeed, Samantha Rogers logged onto her Tinder profile and added the words “seeking work opport...

item.title: Meet the retired Olympic champions starting second careers at Goldman Sachs with zero financial expertise and no office experience
item.description: Olympic champions and pro athletes are finding a new start at Goldman Sachs after retiring from sports—luckily for them, the bank is looking for their...

item.title: Goldman’s board kills DEI — and that’s not a terrible thing
item.description: Corporate boards are overwhelmingly composed of former executives and financial professionals. Is that really diversity?

item.title: The Ex-Taxi Driver at the Center of Russia’s Shadow War
item.description: The Kremlin’s sabotage campaign against European allies of Ukraine has been escalating. It needs people like Aleksei Kolosovsky, 42, to carry it out.

item.title: Armed Man Is Fatally Shot at Mar-a-Lago, Secret Service Says
item.description: The man was killed early Sunday after an “unauthorized entry” into the secure perimeter at President Trump’s resort in Florida, the agency said. The p...

item.title: Newsom Heads to Nashville to Promote His Book, and Finds Many Former Californians
item.description: Scores of Californians have moved to Tennessee for its friendlier business environment and conservative politics. On Saturday, the Democratic governor...

item.title: They Did Deals With Trump to Get Lower Tariffs. Now They Are Stuck.
item.description: Countries that under the threat of tariffs made commitments like enormous investment pledges face the reality that they might have been better off wai...

item.title: Not all degrees are a waste of time: MBA graduates from Harvard, MIT, and Wharton are making over $245,000 just three years after graduating
item.description: While many Gen Z college grads struggle in the job market, recent MBA graduates from Harvard and MIT are pulling in close to a quarter of a million do...

item.title: Trump Tensions Turn U.S.-Canada Olympic Hockey Final Into a ‘Grudge Match’
item.description: Amid growing cross-border political animosity, the game meant even more than usual to Canadian fans who had flown in for one of the marquee events of ...

item.title: Forget 40 hours: The Dutch get their work done in just 32 hours a week—and women made it possible
item.description: Netherlands’ workers are only clocking in four days per week, while American staffers stuck in the 'grindset' average 43 hours on the job weekly.

item.title: The Ex-Taxi Driver at the Center of Russia’s Shadow War
item.description: The Kremlin’s sabotage campaign against European allies of Ukraine has been escalating. It needs people like Aleksei Kolosovsky, 42, to carry it out.

item.title: St. Francis’ Remains, Rarely Seen, Go on Display in Assisi
item.description: The bones of Italy’s patron saint will be shown to the public for a month, to mark the 800th anniversary of his death.

item.title: Trump Looks Ahead to Summit With China’s Xi, but Tariffs and Taiwan Loom
item.description: President Trump said his planned meeting with President Xi Jinping would be a grand display, but tensions over trade and defense could dampen the mood...

item.title: Trump Tensions Turn U.S.-Canada Olympic Hockey Final Into a ‘Grudge Match’
item.description: Amid growing cross-border political animosity, the game meant even more than usual to Canadian fans who had flown in for one of the marquee events of ...

item.title: Arab Leaders Condemn Remarks by U.S. Ambassador to Israel
item.description: The ambassador, Mike Huckabee, seemed to endorse Israeli control of lands stretching from Egypt to Iraq. He said his comments were taken out of contex...
